# Pathfinder 1e Test Fixtures

This directory contains test fixture data for the Pathfinder 1e character sheet importer.

## Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `character.pdf` | Synthetic Pathfinder 1e character sheet PDF for "Valeros" (Human Fighter 5). Generated by `generate_valeros.py`. |
| `generate_valeros.py` | Script to regenerate `character.pdf`. Run from the repo root: `python server/tests/fixtures/pathfinder_1e/generate_valeros.py` |

## Character: Valeros (Human Fighter 5)

Valeros is one of Paizo's iconic characters — a Human Fighter used as the reference test character.
The PDF is a **synthetic fixture** built with `pypdf` widget annotations and does **not** reproduce
any copyrighted Paizo artwork or layout.  Only the character statistics (name, ability scores, class,
and combat values) are included.

## Field Mapping Notes

Pathfinder 1e fields that have no D&D 5e equivalent are stored under system-namespaced keys:

| PF1e Field | Internal Key | Notes |
|------------|--------------|-------|
| Base Attack Bonus | `sheet.bab` | No 5e equivalent; replaces proficiency-based attack |
| Combat Maneuver Bonus | `sheet.cmb` | Grapple/trip/disarm modifier |
| Combat Maneuver Defense | `sheet.cmd` | Defense against maneuvers |
| Spells Per Day | `sheet.spells_per_day` | Dict keyed by spell level string ("1", "2", …) |
| Skill Ranks | `sheet.skills[name].ranks` | PF1e skills have explicit rank counts |
| Special Abilities | `sheet.special_abilities` | Class features / racial traits flat list |
| Weight Carried | `sheet.carry.weight_current` | Encumbrance tracking |
| Race | `sheet.race` | PF1e uses "Race", not "Ancestry/Heritage" |
| Background | `sheet.background` | Explicitly `null` — not a PF1e concept |

## System Detection

The importer detects Pathfinder 1e by looking for **widget_signals** in the PDF's AcroForm
field list:
- **Positive signals**: `Base Attack Bonus`, `CMB`, `CMD`, `Spells Per Day`
- **Negative signals**: `Proficiency Rank`, `Ancestry`, `Heritage`, `Focus Points`

`sheet.system.name` is set to `"Pathfinder 1e"` and `sheet.import.source` is set to `"pdf"`.

## Licensing

The synthetic fixture PDF was generated programmatically and contains no copyrighted Paizo
artwork, layout, or rules text.  The character name "Valeros" and associated statistics are
used under the terms of the Pathfinder Compatibility License for referential purposes.
The field values in the fixture represent a generic Fighter build and do not reproduce
any protected game content.
